homepageprojects.name: SyncIt
homepageprojects.description: A streamlined productivity suite featuring reminders, notes, and checklists. Designed with a focus on privacy and speed, offering a completely offline-first experience with local data persistence.

homepageprojects.name: IM System
homepageprojects.description: Information & management system replacing the manual workflow in the Academic & Publication Division of UCSC. Full-featured web platform improving operational efficiency.

homepageprojects.name: Smart Ride
homepageprojects.description: Google Maps API-based bus ticketing system with web and mobile apps, simplifying public transport ticketing and providing real-time tracking for commuters.

homepageprojects.name: Decathlon UI
homepageprojects.description: A polished Flutter UI for an online sports item shop, exploring modern mobile design patterns and e-commerce UX principles through self-driven learning.

homepageprojects.name: Brick Bounce
homepageprojects.description: A classic 2D arcade game built from scratch in Unity. Explores game physics, collision detection, and interactive mechanics using C# scripting.

homepageprojects.name: Book Manager
homepageprojects.description: A Flutter app for managing book lists when visiting bookshops or book fairs. Create, organize, and track books with prices. Perfect for collectors and book enthusiasts to manage purchases.
